content: User created a new express app with basic routing structure. Clean separation of routes and middleware.
Reviewed initial code and pointed out missing input validation on the users endpoint. User was receptive to the feedback.
User seems comfortable with Express basics but needs practice with error handling patterns.
User implemented zod validation correctly on first try. Good pattern recognition from the example I showed.
Approved the validation PR. Suggested extracting shared validators — user said they'd do it in a follow-up.
User wrote auth middleware tests with good coverage. Mock setup was clean and well-organized.
Testing skills improving noticeably. User now writes tests before being asked. Edge case coverage is getting better.
User is now working on database connection pooling. This is a step up in complexity — good growth opportunity.
Had a good discussion about connection pool sizing. User asked about the tradeoffs between pool size and memory usage.
